sentences.translation: Učitelj je rekao: «Početak je pola puta».
sentences.translationEn: The teacher said: «Beginning is half the journey».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الْبَدْءَ بِالْعَمَلِ هُوَ أَصْعَبُ خُطْوَةٍ.
sentences.translation: To znači da je početak rada najteži korak.
sentences.translationEn: This means that starting the work is the hardest step.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ سَلْمَى تُرِيدُ كِتَابَةَ قِصَّةٍ لَكِنَّهَا خَافَتْ.
sentences.translation: Selma je željela napisati priču ali se bojala.
sentences.translationEn: Salma wanted to write a story but she was afraid.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَتِ الْجُمْلَةَ الْأُولَى وَبَعْدَهَا سَارَتِ الْكِتَابَةُ بِسُهُولَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Napisala je prvu rečenicu i nakon toga je pisanje teklo lako.
sentences.translationEn: She wrote the first sentence and after that the writing flowed easily.
